termsDesc:
**Welcome to REGIX GOD MODE!**

This bot is a private moderation system. Only authorized staff members (Owner, Admin, Mod roles) are permitted to use bot commands.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**🔹 Terms of Use:**
• You must be a designated server staff member.
• Commands affect server-wide moderation settings.
• Abuse of commands will result in a report to server admins.

**🔹 Privacy Notice:**
• Message content is scanned for moderation purposes only.
• Violation data is stored locally as strike counts.

**🔹 Contact:**
• If you believe you should have access, contact a server Admin.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**REGIX Studio** — *GOD MODE Active*
